Name: search_news
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('search_news', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "search_news" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news"("search" := $3) AS "_fn_search_news" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."departments" f WHERE "_fn_search_news"."department_id" = f."id" AND f."budget" > $4::numeric AND f."id" = ANY($5::uuid[]))) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."content" AS "content", "_root.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "_root.base"."department_id" = "id" AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($6::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.department.base") AS "_root.r.department" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
